name: mnemolens
description: Local memory workbench for Codex with SQLite-backed recall, traces, and cleanup reports.

interface.longDescription: Mnemolens gives Codex a local SQLite memory layer with hybrid retrieval, candidate memories, retrieval traces, and reviewable cleanup reports.
defaultPrompt: Search Mnemolens memories for this workspace before making this change.
Show me the memories retrieved for this task.
Run /dream and summarize the cleanup report.
